accurate.why: Accurately describes funding, policy riders, detention requirements, and rescissions; no contradictions with bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all provisions are in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as FY2025 DHS appropriations with specific funding and policy restrictions.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes specific policy conditions and prohibitions restricting use of funds.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes abortion exceptions (rape, incest, life), narrow circumstances for gender-affirming care, and detention minimum.

effective_dates.why: Does not specifically mention the 30/180-day contraceptive effective dates; does not misstate them.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers funding components, border security provisions, ICE requirements, policy prohibitions, and rescissions.

concise.why: Appropriately selective; captures major provisions without excessive detail.

correct_entities.why: CBP, ICE, FEMA, CISA, and CBP One app correctly named.

correct_figures.why: $600 million for steel bollard barriers, 50,000 detention beds, $154 million rescission correctly stated.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
